MASTER CALENDAR COURT

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Susan Lee. M. Shihadeh Jameel, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Gihad Dabit and there being no appearance by Defendant, Bernard Raymundo, the matter is taken off settlement conference, request for jury trial stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
